title: Fumo
description: Adding block sized Fumo plushies to Minecraft
body:
## Notes
- The in-game [Advancements GUI](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Advancement) has instructions on how to operate the mod.
  
- Fumo's can be picked up & rotated while holding shift and interacting.

- Check out [Touhou Little Maid](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhou-little-maid) it pairs well with this mod.
